message:
test(ftui-runtime): add 21 proptest invariants for statistical detectors

Property-based tests for flake detector (11 tests) and e-process throttle
(10 tests) covering: e-value bounds, wealth positivity, lambda bounds,
determinism, config clamping, variance estimation, and match rate tracking.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
